panels.title: Cordial Knowledge Commands per second

panels.description: Size of the batch of messages sent to connections in cordial knowledge
panels.title: Batch Size of messages in Cordial Knowledge

panels.description: Number of  requests about useful authors from host to peers

targets.expr:
sum by(host, peer)(
  rate(consensus_cordial_knowledge_useful_headers_authors[2m])
)
/
ignoring(peer) group_left()
sum by(host)(
  rate(consensus_accepted_block_headers{source="own"}[2m])
)

panels.title: Average useful headers by host to peer

panels.description: Number of requests about useful shard from hosts

targets.expr:
sum by(host)(
  rate(consensus_cordial_knowledge_useful_shards_authors[2m])
)
/
sum by(host)(
  rate(consensus_accepted_block_headers{source="own"}[2m])
)
/
sum by (host) (consensus_subscribed_by == 1)

panels.title: Average useful shards by host

panels.description: How many times given author was reported as useful header
panels.title: Rate messages useful headers by author

panels.description: Number of peers with useful shards
panels.title: Rate messages useful shards by host

panels.description: This plot shows the average time (in milliseconds per second) that an average validator spends per core processing scope
panels.title: Core Task Execution Time per Scope (1 second)

panels.description: This plot shows the average time (in milliseconds per second) that an average validator spends for processing incoming blocks or transactions
panels.title: Processing Time of All Blocks (1 second)

panels.description: This plot shows the average time (in milliseconds per second) that an average validator spends for flushing to disk
panels.title: Processing time of one bundle

panels.description: This plot shows the average time (in milliseconds per second) that an average validator spends for one operation in consensus
panels.title: Time for One Operation

panels.description: Displays the average execution time (in seconds) per task call, computed as the rate of total processing time divided by the rate of task invocations over a 5-minute window. Data is grouped by task label and hostname using Prometheus histogram metrics (scope_processing_time_sum / scope_processing_time_count).
panels.title: Number of tasks in the queue
Block headers in bundle to be sent to the core

panels.description: Number of bundles that contain invalid header per sender
panels.title: Bundles with invalid headers

panels.description: Shows the latency between creation of block and its processing in streaming
panels.title: Latency in streaming

panels.description: The current number of reconstructed transactions which are unknown to the DAG state
panels.title: Reconstructed, but unknown to DAG state
Number of successful live requests processed by peer
Number of successful periodic requests processed by peer

panels.description: Transaction synchronizer fetch latency between host and its peer
panels.title: Median transaction synchronizer fetch latency

panels.description: Transaction synchronizer fetch latency between host and its peer
panels.title: Median transaction synchronizer fetch latency

panels.description: Useful to monitor if any authorities are less reliable authors of transactions if they need to be fetched often.
panels.title: Number of live-fetched transactions authored by authority

panels.description: Useful to monitor if any authorities are less reliable authors of transactions if they need to be fetched often.
panels.title: Number of periodically-fetched transactions by authority
Number of missing transactions by authority

panels.description: Number of currently missing transactions by authority across all hosts
panels.title: Number of currently missing transactions by authority

panels.description: Displays the rate of live block fetches initiated by each host, aggregated across all authorities. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how many blocks it pulls from peers per second. Useful for detecting imbalances or overactive fetchers
panels.title: Live Fetched Blocks Rate per Host
Live synchronization failure rate by host

panels.description: Displays the rate of live number of blocks blocks fetched authored from each authority, aggregated across all hosts. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how often its blocks needs to be fetched.
panels.title: Live Fetched Headers Rate per Authority

panels.description: Displays the rate of live block header fetch requests initiated by each host, aggregated across all authorities. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how many blocks it pulls from peers per second. Useful for detecting imbalances or overactive requester.
panels.title: Live Block Header Request Rate per Host

panels.description: Number of currently active periodic fetch scheduler tasks.
panels.title: Fetch Scheduler Inflight

panels.description: Displays the rate of live block header requests authored from each authority, aggregated across all hosts. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how often its blocks is requested.
panels.title: Live Block Headers Request Rate per Authority

panels.description: Displays the rate of periodic block fetches initiated by each host, aggregated across all authorities. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how many blocks it pulls from peers per second. Useful for detecting imbalances or overactive fetchers
panels.title: Periodic Fetched Headers Rate per Host

panels.description: Rate of periodic sync request per block author
panels.title: Periodic Syncing Fetches Overview

panels.description: Displays the rate of periodic block fetches authored from each authority, aggregated across all hosts. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how often its blocks needs to be fetched.
panels.title: Periodic Fetched Headers Rate per Authority

panels.description: Displays the rate of periodic block fetches initiated by each host, aggregated across all authorities. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how many blocks it pulls from peers per second. Useful for detecting imbalances or overactive fetchers
panels.title: Periodic Requested Headers Rate per Host

panels.description: Rate of live sync request per block author
panels.title: Live Syncing Request Rate

panels.description: Displays the rate of periodic block requests authored from each authority, aggregated across all hosts. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how often its blocks needs to be fetched.
panels.title: Periodic Requested Headers Rate per Authority

panels.description: Round gap to missing ancestors of blocks and headers received through streaming
panels.title: Round gap to missing ancestors from streaming

panels.description: Shows the missing ancestors from streaming by source: block or header. These missing ancestors trigger header synchronisation requests.
panels.title: Missing ancestors from streaming by source

panels.description: Block headers that need to be fetched from other peers
panels.title: Missing block headers

panels.description: Block headers that are missing some part of its past-cone
panels.title: Suspended block headers

panels.description: Total number of block headers that are not accepted. Note that those blocks can be either suspended or missing.
panels.title: Missing ancestors

panels.description: This metric tracks the average number of referencing blocks per missing block. It reflects how many other blocks are waiting on missing data to be processed.
panels.title: Ancestor-to-Missing Block Ratio

panels.description: Displays the top 5 authorities whose blocks most frequently lack required ancestors, based on the 5-minute rate. High rates may indicate improper block propagation or network delays.
panels.title: Top 5 Authorities Causing Missing Ancestors

panels.description: Current number of ongoing fetch tasks.
panels.title: Inflight fetches

panels.description: Rate of number of commits fetched from other authorities.
panels.title: Fetched commits rate

panels.description: Rate of counts instances where commit sync couldn’t proceed due to a gap in block sequence
panels.title: Commit Sync Gap Retries

panels.description: Average fetch commits from a peer authority.
panels.title: Commit Sync Fetch Once Latency

panels.description: Number of pending commit ranges queued for fetch.
panels.title: Pending fetches

panels.description: Rate of fetch failures per authority and error type.
panels.title: Commit Sync Fetch Errors

panels.description: Rate of total number of committed consensus messages
panels.title: Committed Messages Rate

panels.description: This metric calculates, for each authority, the fraction of 2-minute intervals over the past 24 hours in which the authority committed at least one consensus message.
panels.title: Consensus Reliability (24 hour)

panels.description: Summing up bandwidth used by all requests and responses - inbound and outbound.
panels.title: Consensus Bandwidth Usage

panels.description: Percentile sizes of responses served to incoming requests.
panels.title: Inbound Response Size Per Request

panels.description: Percentile sizes of received responses from other nodes.
panels.title: Outbound Response Size Per Request
